issues.description: TrashFromHand is incorrect. Effect specifies trashing from Life cards, not hand. Should use TrashFromLife or equivalent action type.
Filter is empty. Must specify source as Life cards (top or bottom), not hand.
FlipLife is incorrect action. Effect adds a card from deck to Life, which is AddLife or PlayToLife. FlipLife converts Life to hand.
Effect is optional ('You may') but DSL lacks optional/conditional structure. Should include condition allowing player to decline.
